privileged_info_summary: The task requires setting up an Artifactory environment. The verified admin credentials are 'admin' with password 'password' at 'http://localhost:8082'. The environment requires the creation of two repositories: 'tradex-artifacts' and 'tradex-maven-releases'. It also requires a group 'tradex-developers' and a permission target 'tradex-dev-perms'. An access token labeled 'TradeX CI/CD production token' must be generated. Lastly, a real-world java archive 'commons-io-2.15.1.jar' located at '/home/ga/Desktop/commons-io-2.15.1.jar' needs to be uploaded specifically to the 'tradex-artifacts' repository.
